_comment: Structured input for future anonymized report excerpts on floor-assessments-inspections.html. NOTHING here may be published until the owner supplies real, anonymized excerpt text and approves the wording. Excerpts must come from actual professional floor-evaluation reports with all identifying details removed. Do not fabricate excerpts. The page generator does not read this file yet; a future milestone wires approved excerpts into build_floor_assessments.py.
publishing_rule: publish only when status == 'owner_approved' for an excerpt AND overall_status == 'owner_approved'

excerpt_sections.purpose: Shows the depth of observation in a real report: what the floor is, its apparent construction/finish, and its observed condition.
Shows how a report explains the likely cause of an observed problem, with appropriate uncertainty language.
Shows how a report communicates what is and is not realistically possible for a floor.
Shows how a report converts findings into a concrete, scoped recommendation.

optional_sample_pdf.description: A single optional anonymized sample PDF may later demonstrate report format and depth (per the operating manual). Not created; requires the owner to supply and approve the document.
